title: Spicy Chewy Vietnamese Beef Stir-Fry
description: A quick and tasty weeknight dish featuring tender beef, crisp tomatoes, and a spicy kick, perfect for those following a paleo diet.
instructions: Heat coconut oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add beef strips and cook until browned, turning occasionally. Remove from wok and set aside.
In the same wok, add garlic cloves, chili flakes, and diced tomatoes. Stir-fry for about 2 minutes.
Return beef to wok with all ingredients. Add dashi powder or broth cube and fish sauce. Mix well and let simmer until liquid is absorbed, about 5-7 minutes.
Add chopped scallions (green onions) during the last minute of cooking.
Serve hot with lime wedges on side for squeezing over.
